All in. The table is loud now.
conversationLine1: Sometimes luck has a voice.
The galaxy hums differently around a good table.
conversationLine2: Do not worry. I only sound mystical when the stakes are embarrassing.
A good gambler counts cards. A strange one listens too.
sideDeckLocked: Side deck locked. It feels balanced.
These cards sit quietly together.
payoutCapped: The house interrupts the current.
Even fate has to pass accounting, apparently.
refund: The table returns to calm.
No win, no loss. The current stills.
thinking: Give me a moment. The table is trying to say something.
I am listening for the quiet card.
thinkingHard: The future feels crowded. I need the bright path.
The deck is arguing with itself. So am I.
thinkingEasy: The current is gentle right now.
The table feels kind. That makes this easier.
forfeit: That is one way to leave the table.
Fold the chair back in when you go.
cancel: No game, no story. Shame.
Table closed before it got interesting.
invite: Pull up a chair. The deck is awake.
Got time for a set?
acceptInvite: Good. Let us see what the cards think.
Then we play.
tiedRound: No point for either side. Again.
A tie only delays the answer.
tableFill: Nine cards and still standing. Respect the table.
That board is crowded, but it held.
tiebreaker: The tie breaks my way.
Close does not matter when the breaker lands.

has a tiny notebook full of losses
is followed by the smell of fried nuna

keeps checking the ceiling vents

has a cough that sounds like a speeder starting
keeps measuring the table edge with a thumb
